name: Over Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>融合超渦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フュージョン・オーバー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; reveal 1 "Elemental HERO", "Neo-Spacian", or Level 10 monster from your hand, Deck, or Extra Deck, and the targeted monster's name can be treated as the revealed monster's if used as Fusion Material this turn. Send the revealed monster to the GY if you have "Elemental HERO Neos" on your field or in your GY, otherwise shuffle it back into its Deck (if revealed from the hand, shuffle into the Main Deck). You can only activate 1 "Over Fusion" per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster on the field; reveal 1 "Elemental HERO", "Neo-Spacian", or Level 10 monster from your hand, Deck, or Extra Deck, and the targeted monster's name can be treated as the revealed monster's if used as Fusion Material this turn. Send the revealed monster to the GY if you have "Elemental HERO Neos" on your field or in your GY, otherwise shuffle it back into its Deck (if revealed from the hand, shuffle into the Main Deck). You can only activate 1 "Over Fusion" per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Reveals cards from your Extra Deck
Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Returns from your hand to your Deck
